enriched_points.expanded_content: H-infinity control aims to minimize the worst-case gain of a system, ensuring robust performance under various input disturbances and model uncertainties.
This control strategy effectively lowers the sensitivity of system responses to parameter variations, enhancing stability and reliability in dynamic environments.
H-infinity control is utilized in robotics for trajectory tracking, ensuring precision in robotic manipulators, and improving autonomy in mobile robots.
